page_metadata.biotools__summary: Mascot Parser provides an object-oriented Application Programmer Interface (API) to Mascot result files and configuration files, making it easy for programs written in C++, C#, Java, Perl or Python to access Mascot results.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Mascot Parser provides an object-oriented Application Programmer Interface (API) to Mascot result files and configuration files, making it easy for programs written in C++, C#, Java, Perl or Python to access Mascot results.
